strengths: 6+ years of full-stack TypeScript and Node.js development across senior roles, directly matching core technical requirements
Current hands-on experience with AI agent infrastructure and MCP development at re:cinq, addressing a required technical skill
Proven architectural leadership and systems design expertise demonstrated through staff-level positions and successful open-source platform (GISCollective)
concerns: Frontend framework background is primarily Ember.js; React mentioned once at Optilyz but not emphasized, representing a gap relative to primary stack
Nest.js, Vitest, and Jest are not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack technologies; only generic Node.js and testing library references
Security, authentication, and authorization expertise not highlighted despite being listed as required technical skills
response.justification: Szabo demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals with 6+ years of full-stack development in TypeScript and Node.js, the core technical requirements. His current experience with AI agent infrastructure (re:cinq) and proven architectural leadership across multiple staff-level roles align well with the position's technical depth expectations. However, React expertise is limited—primary frontend experience is Ember.js with React mentioned only briefly—creating a gap against the primary stack. His established commitment to testing practices and scalable systems design suggests adaptability, but React framework specialization remains the primary consideration.
